message:
✨ Add nightly quality workflow with desktop + mobile smoke tests (#32)

- Add nightly-quality.yml: runs daily at 6 AM UTC, opens GitHub issue on failure
- Add desktop smoke tests: nav, search bar, shop, species, cart, all pages
- Add playwright.nightly.config.ts: Desktop Chrome + Mobile Chrome (Pixel 7)
- Fix lint error in search-input.tsx: remove useEffect setState anti-pattern
- Smart issue management: updates existing open issue instead of creating duplicates

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+name: Nightly Quality
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: "0 6 * * *" # 6 AM UTC daily (1 AM EST)
+  workflow_dispatch: # allow manual trigger
+
+permissions:
+  issues: write
+
+jobs:
+  smoke-tests:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: apps/web
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: apps/web/package-lock.json
+
+      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npx playwright install chromium --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run desktop + mobile smoke tests
+        id: tests
+        run: npx playwright test --config=playwright.nightly.config.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
+
+      - name: Upload test results
+        if: failure()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: playwright-results
+          path: apps/web/test-results/
+
+      - name: Open regression issue
+        if: failure()
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const fs = require('fs');
+            const output = fs.readFileSync('apps/web/test-output.txt', 'utf8');
+
+            // Extract failed test names
+            const failedLines = output
+              .split('\n')
+              .filter(l => l.includes('✘') || l.includes('FAIL'))
+              .map(l => l.trim())
+              .slice(0, 20)
+              .join('\n');
+
+            const runUrl = `https://github.com/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`;
+
+            // Check for existing open nightly regression issue
+            const existing = await github.rest.issues.listForRepo({
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              state: 'open',
+              labels: 'nightly-regression',
+              per_page: 1,
+            });
+
+            const title = `🚨 Nightly quality regression detected`;
+            const body = [
+              `## Nightly smoke tests failed`,
+              ``,
+              `**Run:** ${runUrl}`,
+              `**Date:** ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}`,
+              `**Commit:** ${context.sha.slice(0, 12)}`,
+              ``,
+              `### Failed tests`,
+              '```',
+              failedLines || 'See workflow run for details',
+              '```',
+              ``,
+              `### What to do`,
+              `1. Check the [workflow run](${runUrl}) for full logs and screenshots`,
+              `2. Download the \`playwright-results\` artifact for failure traces`,
+              `3. Fix the regression and close this issue`,
+            ].join('\n');
+
+            if (existing.data.length > 0) {
+              // Update existing issue with new failure
+              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                issue_number: existing.data[0].number,
+                body: `## New failure detected\n\n${body}`,
+              });
+              console.log(`Updated existing issue #${existing.data[0].number}`);
+            } else {
+              // Create new issue
+              // Ensure label exists
+              try {
+                await github.rest.issues.createLabel({
+                  owner: context.repo.owner,
+                  repo: context.repo.repo,
+                  name: 'nightly-regression',
+                  color: 'e11d48',
+                  description: 'Nightly quality smoke test regression',
+                });
+              } catch (e) {
+                // Label already exists
+              }
+
+              const issue = await github.rest.issues.create({
+                owner: context.repo.owner,
+                repo: context.repo.repo,
+                title,
+                body,
+                labels: ['nightly-regression'],
+              });
+              console.log(`Created issue #${issue.data.number}`);
+            }

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./tests",
+  timeout: 30_000,
+  retries: 1,
+  webServer: {
+    command: "npm run build && npm run start",
+    port: 3000,
+    timeout: 120_000,
+    reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
+  },
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "Desktop Chrome",
+      testDir: "./tests/desktop",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Chrome"] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: "Mobile Chrome",
+      testDir: "./tests/mobile",
+      use: { ...devices["Pixel 7"] },
+    },
+  ],
+});
